heading: Program termination
label: 1514 Program termination
text: No new loans shall be made under this subchapter after . Amounts repaid on or before , on loans theretofore made under shall be deposited in the Geothermal Resources Development Fund for purposes of this subchapter. Amounts repaid after that date on loans theretofore made under , and amounts deposited in the Fund for purposes of this subchapter which remain in the Fund after that date and are not required to secure outstanding obligations under this subchapter, shall be deposited into the United States Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.September 30, 1986September 30, 1986section 1511 of this titlesection 1511 of this title
